'''Nak Shimor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] near the border with the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. [[Andur Sunrider]] purchased the ''[[Lightside Explorer]]'' on Nak Shimor from a [[Vultan]] dealer.
